overview: A marathon training companion app with live GPS tracking, real-time weather-aware pace recommendations, a built-in music player with in-run controls, and a full run history with detailed stats.
features: Live GPS route tracking with real-time speed, distance, and elapsed time
Smart Pace Adjuster: pulls live weather data and warns you to slow down in high heat or humidity
In-run music player with previous/next track controls
Run history with detailed stats for every session
Persistent run storage — all your data saved across sessions
